delta_log10_cfu: CA-MRSA. Delta = log10 CFU/thigh at 24 h minus inoculum.

index: #   - Doxycycline MICs (Table 1): MW2 0.25; R2507 4; R2529 4 ug/ml.
#   - 24 h in-vivo Delta-log10 (Table 3 + Results text): MW2 -1.2 (susceptible);
# Single regimen (100 mg/kg q12h) x 3 strains => 3 points; fAUC/MIC varies via strain MIC.
# Pattern: bacteriostatic -- max kill ~1.2 log even at fAUC/MIC ~82; NEVER bactericidal
#   (>=3 log). Stasis (Delta=0) falls between fAUC/MIC ~5 and ~82
#   doxycycline fAUC/MIC ~24-25-for-stasis anchor. The model must reproduce: no >=3-log kill.
